profile.name: Pavan Kumar V H
profile.title: AI Engineer & Full Stack Developer
profile.tagline: Building intelligent systems that actually ship.
profile.bio: Full-stack developer with a focus on AI-driven products. I build systems that combine modern web architecture with cutting-edge AI — from RAG pipelines and vector search to graph-based fraud detection. Alongside engineering, I bring a creative eye through cinematography and professional photography.

experience.description: Co-founded a nutrition startup incubated at Vels Innovation Council. Leading strategy, operations, and business development — from market analysis and unit economics to partnership discussions with gyms and brands.
Digital agency building SaaS products, websites, apps, and AI automations for clients. Also provided cinematography and professional photography for marketing support.
Built and sold custom gaming and office computers. Provided hardware support to businesses, sold refurbished GPUs, and developed LAN networking solutions for offices.

ventures.name: The Protein Company
ventures.description: Nutrition startup incubated at Vels Innovation Council. Building next-gen nutrition solutions — leading strategy, unit economics, and partnerships with gyms and brands across Chennai.

ventures.name: LoopZen
ventures.description: Digital agency building SaaS products, websites, and AI automations for clients. Also built EventVision — an AI face-recognition photo delivery system that handled 7K+ guests.

ventures.name: Loop Computers
ventures.description: Custom PC building startup. Designed gaming and office rigs, sold refurbished GPUs, provided hardware support, and built LAN networking solutions for businesses.

projects.name: RAGHost
projects.description: Full-stack RAG chatbot builder. Upload documents, connect Pinecone and Gemini, deploy an embeddable chat widget instantly. Engineered for scale with Redis caching, Bull queues, and CPU clustering.

projects.name: Quantora AI
projects.description: Real-time fraud detection framework using dynamic graph modeling. Custom SAGRA algorithm detects coordinated fraud rings, circular money flows, and synthetic identity clusters with an explainability layer.

projects.name: typing.dev
projects.description: Terminal-aesthetic typing practice app with AI-generated code snippets. CRT phosphor design with JetBrains Mono, scanline effects, and a global leaderboard. Built for developers who want to type faster.

projects.name: Physique OS
projects.description: Visual fitness tracking platform with interactive charts, before/after photo sliders, streak system, and achievement badges. Glassmorphism UI with measurement tracking and PDF export.

projects.name: LoopZen EventVision
projects.description: Face-recognition system for events. Guests scan a QR code, register their face, and receive their photos instantly. Successfully handled 7,000+ guests at a single wedding event.
